namespace TestApp.Mappers;

/// <summary>
/// Source generated mapper from <c>Person</c> to <c>PersonModel</c>.
/// </summary>
partial class PersonMapper
    : global::Arbiter.Mapping.MapperProfile<global::TestApp.Models.Person, global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel>
{
    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel? Map(global::TestApp.Models.Person? source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            return default;

        return new global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel
        {
            Id = source.Id,
            FirstName = source.FirstName,
            DepartmentName = source.Department?.Name,
        };
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override void Map(global::TestApp.Models.Person source, global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel destination)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        if (destination is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(destination));

        destination.Id = source.Id;
        destination.FirstName = source.FirstName;
        destination.DepartmentName = source.Department?.Name;
    }

    private static readonly System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<Func<global::TestApp.Models.Person, global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel>> _projectExpression =
        src => new global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel
        {
            Id = src.Id,
            FirstName = src.FirstName,
            DepartmentName = src.Department != null ? src.Department.Name : null,
        };

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public override IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel> ProjectTo(IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.Person> source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        return source.Select(_projectExpression);
    }

}
